categories.world_function: Produces the visible decision chain of the world: councils, magistracies, quota adjudicators, registry keepers, tribunal clerks, sentence allocators, seal officers, permit writers, compliance auditors, and local subordinate officials who make rulership tangible below named leaders.
role_families: route law wardens and checkpoint recorders
punishment, restitution, and labor assignment officials

categories.world_function: Produces regulated throughput: depot stewards, weigh clerks, harbor factors, convoy quartermasters, tool allocators, stock ledgers, ration issuers, export certifiers, market inspectors, and processing supervisors who convert raw production into trackable exchange.
role_families: harbor, bridge, and market throughput control

categories.world_function: Produces connective tissue between blocs: envoys, corridor mediators, treaty carriers, bonded escorts, convoy interpreters, archive-copy couriers, neutral hearing officers, and route-specific diplomacy staff who prevent distance and difference from collapsing trade or law.

Produces the shadow mirror of every legal system: smugglers, falsifiers, illicit brokers, sabotage coordinators, contraband handlers, side-route guides, permit forgers, bribe intermediaries, and black-ledger keepers who parasitize the lawful state rather than replacing it.

Produces the inhabited machine-state underneath elite names: switch crews, dome patchers, quarry lantern gangs, reactor tenders, bridge riggers, watch relays, shrine staff, sanitation crews, salvage teams, burial handlers, ration runners, and line-maintenance teams.
role_families: food, fuel, and ration distribution labor
shrine, archive, and civic support workers

justification: Repository synthesis layer built to make strongly supported canon operational without overriding source truth.
